name: LEMMICK WORLD
short_description: Guide a tiny Steppe Lemming to the goal. Featuring 100 levels filled with intricate puzzles built on creative gimmick combinations. A pure logic-based puzzle game with no action elements—perfect for players who love thoughtful, challenging brainteasers.
detailed_description:
A True Puzzle Adventure with Step Lemming

On fields filled with height differences, push and drop blocks, dive into holes to travel underground, carry water in buckets to extinguish fires, and activate mechanisms using running wheels—all while making your way to the goal.
These gimmicks work both individually and in combination, drawing out the full joy of trial and error as you ask yourself, “What’s the correct move?”
Featuring 100 levels across 10 unique areas—what awaits you at the end of your journey?
This is a pure puzzle game with no action elements. What you’ll need is not quick reflexes, but careful observation and logical thinking.

How to Play

If you reach the goal that looks like a leaf, the level is cleared.
Each area contains 10 levels, and clearing 5 of them allows you to proceed to the next area.
As the levels increase, the number of gimmick types also increases.

Recommended For

  • Players who enjoy deep, thoughtful puzzles that reward careful planning

  • Those looking for a game they can enjoy even if they’re not good at action games

  • Fans of cute character and pixel art aesthetics

Gameplay Settings

  • The language can be set to English or Japanese.

  • Regarding windowed mode: In addition to fullscreen mode, you can choose from windowed sizes of 1920x1080, 1440x810, 960x540, and 480x270.

  • The game can be played using either a gamepad or a keyboard, and key/button bindings can be customized for both.

  • Volume settings for background music and sound effects can each be adjusted across 20 levels.
